name: Ensemble: OBI-1 and Microprice Deviation
hypothesis: Requiring a consensus between two powerful but distinct imbalance signals (OBI-1 and Microprice Deviation), both of which showed >90% WR in prior tests, should create a more robust and reliable signal. This ensemble approach aims to filter out false positives and confirm strong directional pressure, potentially at the cost of signal frequency.
mutation_note: Per feedback analyst recommendation for 'ensemble_vote'. Combined the parent's core OBI signal with another high-performing signal from iter0 (microprice_dev_bps > 1.0) to improve robustness.
